title: narcissus × montanus
intro: Narcissus × montanus, also known as the hybrid daffodil, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to contain alkaloids and glycosides, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Narcissus × montanus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × montanus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
